mapper.select:
WITH matched_products AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */ p.id FROM products p
AND CONTAINS(p.name, '%' || #{keyword} || '%') > 0
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
) SELECT p.id AS productId, o.id AS productOptionId, p.name AS name, first_picture.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation, c.name AS categoryName, p.price AS price, o.stock AS stock, o.expire_date AS expireDate FROM matched_products mp INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = mp.id INNER JOIN product_options o ON p.id = o.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, picture_saved_location FROM ( SELECT product_id, picture_saved_location, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC) AS row_num FROM product_pictures ) WHERE row_num = 1 ) first_picture ON first_picture.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
ORDER BY o.expire_date ASC
ORDER BY o.stock ASC, o.expire_date ASC
ORDER BY p.id DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.name FROM categories c INNER JOIN products p ON c.id = p.category_id
